"...h-huh.....ughhh.....w-wha....ughhh....where am I?" Kim moaned grogily as she started to wake up, trying to adjust to her surroundings. As her eyes began to focus her face went red as she took in everything before her: she was what looked like an underground chamber, and strewn about the room were various devices and machinery for....milking cows?

1232422.content:
Kim slowly shuffled her way into the kitchen, her mother was already there, busily cooking up breakfast. "Kim? That you?" she asked, finally turning to see her. "Hmm, hi Mom, I see you're in quite a mood today.," Kim smirked, staring at her.

Ann was in her underwear, a white apron was draped across her front to keep her clean as she cooked, though it did nothing to hide her very large bulge, which only got bigger as she watched her daughter sit down at the table. Ann promptly turned off the stove and sat down across from her.

"Soooooo......how did you sleep?" Ann asked, getting harder beneath the table, doing her best to seem calm. Kim smiled, despite the bags under her eyes she seemed cheerful. "I...(yawns)...I barely slept at all, I couldn't stop thinking about our...."little talk"...last night," she began, using air quotes.

"Ohhh...right, that. Did we talk about that last night?" Ann replied, trying to act coy and innocent. Kim smirked, "Ohh we did, trust me, you can't forget your own mother's hard on quite that easily," she teased, making Ann blush, her cock still getting harder under the table.

Kim yawned again before clearing her throat, "I haven't been able to think about anything else since we've talked about it. I keep thinking about all the ways that it might be a mistake, but I just can't find one, it just keeps sounding better and better, it's driving me crazy," she moans, "I can't keep this ignoring this anymore, I'll run out of clean underwear by dinner if I try," she giggled, making Ann bite her lip.

"Soooo....you'll do it?" she asked in an almost hushed tone, her eyes flared open with lust. Kim bit her lip and swallowed, looking like how a recovering alcoholic might look at a cold drink, "Yes......(moans)....yes...I'll do it." She starts shaking with excitement and takes a deep breath. "Let me be your breeder!" she yells out triumphantly, rising up from the table, her arms outstretched, as if she was praying out loud for a miracle.

Ann's heart nearly stopped, her eyes instantly started welling up; she never once felt closer to her daughter than this one moment, not even when she was born. She too rises from the table, but her massive reaction snags on the underside and flings the whole thing over, smashing hard against the tiled floor.

The two of them stop in their tracks, Ann feeling mortified at what she'd done, while Kim merely stared at her bulge. "I see I wasn't the only one struggling with this," she teased, making Ann blush. "Hehe, come here," she commands, and Kim strolls over, quickly snatched up in Ann embrace as they lock eyes and kiss.

"Mmmm.....it's going to be wonderful Kimmie, you have no idea," Ann said, as Kim's legs were straddled around her cock. "Mmm...I hope so....hmmm mmm I hope so!" she cheered, as they locked lips again.

1533311.content:
Our scene begins as Kim Possible was once again foiling Dr.Drakens plan for world domination. This was becoming a daily routine for the teen. Days would typically go as Eat, drink, Beat Draken, defeat shego, sleep, repeat. As long as, shego didn't win, things would be fine.
Shego had been brought to her knee's once again. Each loss a bruise to her ego. At first, losing didn't sting that much but eventually the loses started to stack against her and each one was even more embarrassing than the last.
"I have to hand it to you shego! No other villain is petty enough to fight me every week like this. Surely, this can't be healthy for you. Have you considered a vacation?" Kim said mockingly as she dodged Shego's punches
"Why didn't I think of that Kimmy? Y'know another way to vent? By eating your frustrations!" Shego shouted
In her desperation, she lunged at Kim. Fitting Kim's head into her mouth and shoving her down her throat. Within seconds Shego had swallowed Kim up to her waist. Kim continued to struggle only to quicken the pace as she slid into Shego's gut. Craning her head back, with one mighty gulp she swallowed the rest of teen super spy.
Shego's stomach expanded outward as the seams of her jumpsuit were struggling to contain her now orb like gut. Tried as it might have, her belt finally snapped in two. Her stomach rapidly grew outward, tearing the midrift of her jumpsuit open and exposing her now giant spherical belly to the cool air. Normally Shego would be pissed about packing on this much weight in such little time but for just this once she was ecstatic to be rid of that brat once and for all. Struggling to carry this new found weight Shego fell to her knee's, her stomach hitting the ground with a meaty smack.
"Well Kimmy! I'd say it was nice knowing ya but I'd be lying." Shego chuckled as she rubbed her belly
